content: TASK-043 interrupt done: removed render-time relocation of area boxes because nested zones could drift away from their member components. Zone/boundary/subgraph boxes stay anchored to layout-derived member geometry; draw order and visual outsets provide separation. Regression now checks comprehensive rendered zones contain their member nodes and child zones. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
